name: Feature Test Planner
description: Produces the test plan covering the new feature: unit tests, integration tests, and edge cases.

checks.pass: 📦 {count} packages found — will check for existing test patterns
checks.fail: ℹ️  No packages directory — will define tests at project level

checks.prompt: Produce a test plan for the new feature: (1) 5 unit test cases for the business logic layer, (2) 3 integration test scenarios for the API endpoints, (3) 2 edge cases requiring special handling, (4) test data fixtures needed. Format as a structured list with test ID and description.
